popularStory.description: Edmund soon obtained, however, important possessions and dignities, for soon after the forfeiture of Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester on 25 October 1265, Edmund received the Earldom of Leicest …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster於1245年1月16日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Henry III King of England37歲，母親Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England23歲。他於1269年4月8日與Aveline de Forz在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比結婚。他於1264年登記服兵役。他去世於1296年6月5日在法國阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯巴約訥享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster于1245年1月16日出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Henry III King of England37岁，母亲Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England23岁。他于1269年4月8日与Aveline de Forz在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比结婚。他于1264年登记服兵役。他去世于1296年6月5日在法国阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯巴約訥享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster was born on 16 January 1245, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Henry III King of England, was 37 and his mother, Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England, was 23. He married Aveline de Forz on 8 April 1269, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. He registered for military service in 1264. He died on 5 June 1296, in Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster est né le 16 janvier 1245, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Henry III King of England, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Aveline de Forz le 8 avril 1269, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1264. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1296, à Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster am 16. Januar 1245 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry III King of England 37 und seine Mutter Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England 23. Er hat am 8. April 1269 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England Aveline de Forz geheiratet. Er hat sich 1264 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 5. Juni 1296 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster è nato il il 16 gennaio 1245 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Henry III King of England, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Aveline de Forz il 8 aprile 1269, nel Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1264. Morì il 5 giugno 1296, nel Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster(이)가 1245년 1월 16일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry III King of England(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1269년 4월 8일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Aveline de Forz(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1264년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1296년 6월 5일 프랑스 아키테인 p이ee스-앳랜티크스 베이니에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster nasceu em 16 de janeiro de 1245, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry III King of England, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Aveline de Forz em 8 de abril de 1269, em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1264. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1296, em Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster родился 16 января 1245 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry III King of England было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Aveline de Forz 8 апреля 1269 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. В 1264 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 5 июня 1296 г. в местности беенн, пирeнeес-атлантикуесь, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster nació el 16 de enero de 1245, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry III King of England, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eleanor Berenger of Provence Queen of England, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Aveline de Forz el 8 de abril de 1269, en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1264. Murió el 5 de junio de 1296, en Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
